final:
module shift_register (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input shift_left,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (rst) begin
            q <= 4'd0;
        end else if (shift_left) begin
            q <= {q[2:0], 1'b0};
        end else begin
            q <= {1'b0, q[3:1]};
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= 4'd7; // Misleading reset value
      if (shift_left) begin
        q <= {q[2:0], 1'b1};
      end else begin
        q <= {1'b1, q[3:1]};
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
